feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Boofing?
entry.content: Due to my late stage alcoholism, I start puking blood almost every time I drink heavily, both from stomach issues and esophageal varices which is every day (though I don't pop the third bottle of vodka until late evening, usually not even finishing it because I like having some ready to repair quickly in the morning). I wonder if this can be mitigated by "boofing"? Do you have experience with boofing? What strength and how much at once can you pour "into it" without it burning?

entry.title: /b/ Random: My neighbor's moaning like she's getting assfucked or something
entry.content: About 6 months ago, two women (I'd guess around 35?) moved into the apartment next to ours. They introduced themselves normally. One of them has a little daughter, so she apologized in advance in case the kid was noisy. They also made it clear right away that they weren't a couple, just friends. It's just my partner and me living in our apartment, and there are only two apartments on this floor—ours and theirs. Everything seemed completely normal until one Friday night. I heard one of them comin

entry.content: Will foids ever recover from dating apps? I was having a discussion with a foid-friend today. She genuinely believes the guy she settles down with will be BETTER (meaning more attractive, social, more money) than the chads who will fuck her off a dating app. I've known her for a long time, and she was saying this without a shred of doubt. In fact she was completely taken a back when I suggested the guy who might want a relationship would be, in any quality, less than the guy who will fuck her. S

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If Congo wins
entry.content: I am going to suck a 9 inch big black nword dick, I don't fucking care about it, nwords suck at soccer and only the white man wins in lit every game, whites are going to win for being Aryan and superior, nogs are going to lose. And if Aryans lose, which is not going to happen, I am gonna suck the biggest nword dick I can find, which is also a total myth since nwords have korean tier pee pees and are cucks to BWC

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Evangelicals & Jews
entry.content: Can someone explain why the FUCK evangelical Christians are so enthralled with Israel and jews? It makes no sense at all. I remember when I was a little and I asked the Sunday school lady why we always sang songs about "children of Israel" and "chosen ones" and Hebrews and children of Abraham when we are Christians, not jews, She got pissed af. Went to Catholic elementary school, and it was about the same, just with an extra DLC with statues of Mary everywhere.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: can someone with experience with macOS errors help identify this error
entry.content: so as the title says i need someone with more experience with macOS errors, now as for the error, the system just out of nowhere locks up and does not respond to any mouse or keyboard inputs, the graphic that displays when a kernel panic happens does not display either, the system just locks up, does not respond and then i have to force restart. it has happened twice now and it has not been over a month since the first time and when it happened a couple minutes ago. i am using a 2017 13 inch Mac

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: white privilege is actually real
entry.content: I got picked up by a sheriff's deputy once for being very drunk in public and falling over while I was walking home. He just gave me a ride back to my house and didn't ticket me or anything. What would have happened if I was black?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: So, due to the insane costs of storage expansion, storing stuff on their cloud s…

Help me understand here.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Master P.: Ghetto D [No Limit/Priority, 1997] The title track is noxious and mir…
entry.content: Master P.: Ghetto D [No Limit/Priority, 1997] The title track is noxious and miraculous, hooked to a hectoring male singsong unlike anything I've ever heard. Subject: how to manufacture and distribute rock cocaine. The hit vies in rank sentimentality with "Candle in the Wind," hooked to a male groan also unlike anything I've ever heard. Subject: dead homies, a hard reality turned soft metaphor. The rest is underproduced propaganda for, reflections of, or fantasies about thug life that hold intri

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The answer really is "just be yourself" but that's only a part of it. It's good …
entry.content: The answer really is "just be yourself" but that's only a part of it. It's good advice because by being yourself, you ensure that you only attract people that like your authentic self and thus you can be happy not having to put up airs. However, if your authentic self is a mean, nasty person; the pool of people who would be interested in being around you becomes more narrow and likely filled with other mean, nasty people. I also genuinely don't believe that there is anyone that hates a nice pers

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I've had this 128gb Intel 320 SSD since 2011 back when everyone said SSDs were a…
entry.content: I've had this 128gb Intel 320 SSD since 2011 back when everyone said SSDs were a meme and die too quick Well... how come it's still going? 26tb reads and 29tb writes and reporting 94% health

entry.title: /o/ Auto: BMW M3/M5
entry.content: Is any BMW M3, incl. E9X and F80, or an M5 (E60, F10) a chick magnet? What I mean here isn't to woo them (I'd buy regardless), but to take them out on a nice ride. Is it good for such a thing? Also, if there's anyone who has such a car, can you tell me your ownership experience please... I'd love to hear from the current/former owners. This can include driving experience, mods etc.

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /o/ Auto: I mean this *entirely* unironically: we never shouldve gone past this level of i…
entry.content: I mean this *entirely* unironically: we never shouldve gone past this level of interior displayage Modern cars with 2650 total inches of display area invariably look ugly and/or tacky. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I've been hired to make a Les Miserables film
entry.content: I am taking a page from my favourite Hollywood directors, writers, and actors, and I'm not going to watch any films, plays, or read any of the source material. I don't know anything about it or Victor Hugo and I'm proud to say it, but I wanted to make a film for a modern audience to show that lesbians are not miserable at all, they are just misunderstood and discriminated against. The movie has been given a budget of $200 million dollars and I'm going to make it about the strong and powerful wom

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why do Protestant Baptists (conservative) and SSPX schismatics treat homosexuali…
entry.content: Why do Protestant Baptists (conservative) and SSPX schismatics treat homosexuality like it is some kind of special sin above literally all other sins? First of all, being mentally a homosexual (being in love with a man) is not even a sin. The sin is the homosexual sex. But even the homosexual sex is not a "worse" sin than other sins. It is essentially a sin only because it is fornification, aka sex outside of marriage, sex for purposes other than reproduction. If you ever had sex outside of marr

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I feel schizy about this record. It rocks with a brutal, uncompromising force th…
entry.content: I feel schizy about this record. It rocks with a brutal, uncompromising force that's very impressive--sort of a slicked-down, tightened-up, heavied-out MC5--and the songwriting is much improved from albums one and two. But the lyrics recall the liberal fantasy of rock concert as Nuremberg rally, equating sex with victimization in a display of male supremacism that glints with humor only at its cruelest--song titles like "Room Service" and "Ladies in Waiting." In this context, the band's refusal

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump reports over $1.4 billion in income from crypto ventures
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/world/us/tr ump-reports-more-than-14-billion-in come-crypto-ventures-2026-06-30/ June 30 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump reported more than $1.4 billion in income from his family’s crypto ventures last year, showing how Trump now derives most of his income from digital assets that have benefited from his policies, according to a review of his latest financial disclosures on Tuesday. The filings, his annual disclosure for 2025 with the U.S. Office of Government Eth

entry.title: /b/ Random: I feel so bad for killing the hunstman spider i found in my house yesterday. it …
entry.content: I feel so bad for killing the hunstman spider i found in my house yesterday. it was just there to hunt cockroaches and other pests for me and i smashed my cleaner onto it like a maniac. especially when 3 of its legs had been broken off and it laid there looking at me in silent waiting for the final blow i felt like the biggest asshole ever.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Are Firefox devs starting to struggle with Firefox development? There have been …
entry.content: Are Firefox devs starting to struggle with Firefox development? There have been four point releases in two weeks and some of the bugs are ones that could easily been caught if they did more testing. It looks like Manifest v2 has also increased the amount of newbies using Firefox so Firefox is getting more bug reports in general. Does Firefox need to realign their dev schedule to properly triage bugs instead of their constant having to squeeze out patches and force restarts all the time (some rel

entry.title: /news/ News: Blue state schools turning off lights to feed data centers
entry.content: https://www.yahoo.com/news/us/artic les/henrico-county-37-data-centers- 182949513.html Somewhere in Henrico County, Virginia, a teacher is being asked to shut down a computer at night so the county can shave a few bucks off its electric bill. Meanwhile, 37 data centers hum along across roughly 2,700 acres of county land, each one drinking power at a scale that makes your home energy use look like a nightlight — a demand surge accelerated by projects like the Stargate Project. On June 26, County

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >own a project car >it's going well and is manageable >start getting bored >acqu…
entry.content: >own a project car >it's going well and is manageable >start getting bored >acquire more cars to fill insatiable appetite >end up hoarding a fleet of shitters >get overwhelmed and begin to resent them >sell them all >That was retarded, never again >momentary relief till boredom sets in again and cycle repeats What is wrong with me anons. Why do I do this to myself. I could just have one or two NICE cars.

I did not post >>24593258 or >>24563858 Any future posts with my old pictures will not be me. >dadc >good riddance >literal who >faggot >reddit spacing >weak schizo >your fault for posting it >you're a lair It's okay, just let it all

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: What is the British media covering up? What REALLY happened to these people?
entry.content: Because they sure as hell didn't slip into waist deep water, uttered "guess I'll die", refused to simply stand up to prevent themselves drowning, and then casually let themselves drown. These cases are always instantly labeled as "non-suspicious", in a "nothing to see here" kind of way. Reminds me of "fell out of a window" in Russia.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8349 Fagatoro Edition Previous Thread: >>83777885 F-list…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8349 Fagatoro Edition Previous Thread: >>83777885 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why do genuine car parts last so much longer?
entry.content: Even Lemforder/Sachs suspension, Bosch/NGK plugs and coils, and Denso sensors don't seem to last the 20+ years that the genuine parts do, even though the genuine parts have the same markings. >inb4 they are the same parts Yeah, sure they are, when the lemforder is made in China and the original is made in Germany? Same with the NGK, made in China but the original is made in Japan? Explain that then

entry.content: This evening I met a Pakistani guy at the mall. He is tall, skinny and pale. He doesn't look Pakistani at all. I thought he was Syrian. He speak English without the annoying South Asian "accent".

entry.title: /b/ Random: I hate my fetish and I don't know how to live with it
entry.content: I'm putting this out here so I can get it into words and hopefully get some input from people who know what the hell's going on. I get a boner from the thought of men transforming into women. Gonna get gross and personal. Scroll on if that bothers you. >be me, male child with unsupervised internet access >browsing youtube, find comic of either mario or sonic character being turned female; don't remember which >think idly from time to time about other fictional characters genderbent. I remember m
